hooks.command: bash -c "file=$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c \"import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path','') or d.get('path',''))\" 2>/dev/null); content=$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c \"import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('new_string','') or d.get('content',''))\" 2>/dev/null); if echo \"$file\" | grep -q '\.tf$'; then if echo \"$content\" | grep -qiE '(password|secret|access_key|connection_string)\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"$][^\"]{3,}\"'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Plaintext secret detected in Terraform file. Use azurerm_key_vault_secret instead. See infrastructure/CLAUDE.md for the required pattern.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi"
hooks.description: Block plaintext secrets in Terraform files. Secrets must go in Azure Key Vault.

hooks.command: bash -c "cmd=$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c \"import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))\" 2>/dev/null); if echo \"$cmd\" | grep -q 'terraform plan'; then echo \"[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] terraform plan executed\" >> .claude/iac-change-log.md; fi"
